title: Longest Substring Of All Vowels in Order
titleCn: 所有元音按顺序排布的最长子字符串

testcases.input: word = "aeiaaioaaaaeiiiiouuuooaauuaeiu" Output: 13 Explanation: The longest beautiful substring in word is "aaaaeiiiiouuu" of length 13.
testcases.expectedOutput: 13 Explanation: The longest beautiful substring in word is "aaaaeiiiiouuu" of length 13.

testcases.input: word = "aeeeiiiioooauuuaeiou" Output: 5 Explanation: The longest beautiful substring in word is "aeiou" of length 5.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: The longest beautiful substring in word is "aeiou" of length 5.

testcases.input: word = "a" Output: 0 Explanation: There is no beautiful substring, so return 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: There is no beautiful substring, so return 0.
